title: Diversify window types per floor from typology and era
description: 926 buildings have identical window types on every floor. For Bay-and-Gable typology: ground floor should have taller 1-over-1, upper floors 2-over-2, gable floor small fixed/arched. For storefronts: ground floor storefront glazing, upper floors residential. Update windows_detail with varied types per floor based on typology, era, and has_storefront.
